results.title: Ultrasound-on-Chip Licensing Market to Reach USD 200.5 Million by 2036 as AI-Enabled Imaging and Embedded Ultrasound Technologies Drive Healthcare Innovation
results.description: NEWARK, Del., July 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- According to Future Market Insights (FMI), the global Ultrasound-on-Chip Licensing Market is projected to grow from USD 50.0 million in 2026 to USD 200.5 million by 2036, registering a CAGR of 14.9%.
